summary: Comprehensive pre-deploy backend testing completed for Bibi Cars V3.2. Tested all critical APIs including Google Reviews integration, Google Sign-In, public catalog endpoints, and all 4 role-based cabinets (Admin/Manager/TeamLead/Customer). 74/75 tests passed (98.7% success rate).

minor_issues.impact: Cannot retrieve auth settings with google.allowedDomains as mentioned in review request
minor_issues.note: This endpoint may not be implemented. The google integration settings are available via /api/admin/integrations/google which works correctly.

passed_tests: ✅ All authentication flows (Admin, Manager, TeamLead, Customer)
✅ Public catalog endpoints: GET /api/public/vehicles (with filters: limit, price_min, price_max, make, model)
✅ Google Reviews integration: GET /api/public/google-reviews (returns approved >=4 star reviews)
✅ Google Reviews integration: GET /api/admin/google-reviews/config (admin config with masked API key)
✅ Google Reviews integration: GET /api/admin/google-reviews (admin moderation list)
✅ Google Sign-In: POST /api/customer-auth/google/verify (correctly rejects bad token with 400, not 500)
✅ Admin integrations: GET /api/admin/integrations (returns all provider configs)
✅ All 17 admin endpoints tested (providers/stats, ext-clients, integrations, email-templates, blog, etc.)
✅ All 7 manager endpoints tested (orders, calls, invoices, tracking)
✅ All 16 team lead endpoints tested (dashboard, leads, tasks, shipping, performance)
✅ All 12 customer endpoints tested (profile, orders, contracts, deals, deposits, invoices, notifications)
✅ HMAC extension endpoint: POST /api/vesselfinder/heartbeat (signature verification working)
action_item_for_main_agent: ✅ Backend is production-ready! Only 1 minor issue: /api/admin/auth/settings endpoint does not exist (returns 404). If this endpoint is required for the google.allowedDomains feature, it needs to be implemented. However, Google integration settings are accessible via /api/admin/integrations/google which works correctly. All critical functionality tested and working: authentication (all 4 roles), public catalog, Google Reviews integration (public feed + admin moderation), Google Sign-In (client ID + verify endpoint), and all cabinet-specific endpoints.

google_reviews_integration.public_endpoint: GET /api/public/google-reviews - Returns proper structure with rating, count, reviews array. Reviews are correctly filtered to >=4 stars.
google_reviews_integration.admin_config: GET /api/admin/google-reviews/config - Returns full config with masked API key preview
google_reviews_integration.admin_moderation: GET /api/admin/google-reviews - Returns moderation list with items and count
google_reviews_integration.notes: Integration is fully functional. API key is properly masked in admin responses. Review filtering by rating works correctly.

google_signin_integration.client_id_endpoint: GET /api/auth/google-client-id - Returns clientId and enabled status
google_signin_integration.verify_endpoint: POST /api/customer-auth/google/verify - Correctly rejects invalid tokens with 400 (not 500)
google_signin_integration.notes: Integration endpoints exist and handle errors correctly. Cannot test full OAuth flow without real Google token, but error handling is correct.

public_catalog.vehicles_endpoint: GET /api/public/vehicles - Returns 6021 total vehicles. Filters working: limit, price_min, price_max, make, model
public_catalog.brands_endpoint: GET /api/public/brands - Returns brand list with counts
public_catalog.notes: All public catalog endpoints working. Note: 'search' parameter is not implemented in the endpoint signature, but other filters work correctly.

authentication.notes: All 4 role-based authentication flows working correctly. Tokens are properly generated and accepted by protected endpoints.

cabinet_endpoints.notes: All role-based cabinet endpoints tested and working. No 500 errors detected.
